nodes.title: Markdown Note: Model Links
widgets_values:
Model links:

[https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy_fp8_scaled/tree/main/Wan22Animate](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy_fp8_scaled/tree/main/Wan22Animate)

[https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/tree/main/Lightx2v](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/tree/main/Lightx2v)

[https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/tree/main/LoRAs/Wan22_relight](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/tree/main/LoRAs/Wan22_relight)

Text encoder:

[https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/blob/main/umt5-xxl-enc-bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/blob/main/umt5-xxl-enc-bf16.safetensors)

VAE:

[https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/blob/main/Wan2_1_VAE_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/blob/main/Wan2_1_VAE_bf16.safetensors)
色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走

For long generations you can use either context options, or the original long gen method, which is activated when frame_window_size is smaller than total frames(num_frames). When using this method the window size stays constant, extra frames are generated in the case the last window is cut short.

When using context options, set num_frames and frame_window_size to be equal

Otherwise set frame_window_size to something the model is capable of doing normally, original default is 77, 81 seems to work too.

Original method is probably better for motion etc, and is faster, but the benefit of context windows is that it doesn't degrade over time on long clips.

Length control:
- VHS_LoadVideo.frame_load_cap now = 1800 frames (~60s @30fps).
- For ~30s set it to 900.
- Ensure the source video is at least that long; otherwise frame_count will be shorter.

Audio:
- Added Get_input_audio and wired to all VHS_VideoCombine nodes so the output MP4 includes the source audio.

Face lock update:
- identity path now favors the reference image over driving-video face crops.

nodes.title: Note: SAM2 detection
widgets_values: You can use either the detected bbox or the kay_frame_body_points to positive coordinates, if one fails to creater proper mask, try the other
These are new nodes in KJNodes
the woman is dancing to cameara

nodes.title: Markdown Note: face lock v2 fix
widgets_values: V2 fix: restored face_images as frame sequence from PoseAndFaceDetection and fed reference_image into retarget_image. This avoids WanVideoSampler index-out-of-bounds while preserving identity better than a single-frame face input.

nodes.title: Identity lock tuning
widgets_values:
Face-preservation version:
- WanVideoAnimateEmbeds.face_images now uses the reference image instead of detected driving-video faces.
- start_ref_image is wired to the same reference image.
- SAM2 body mask is now fed into WanVideoAnimateEmbeds.mask.
This keeps the original character identity much more stable across the clip.
